Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_T_001
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13204 0 0}Now then, to business. How might I help you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_EXIT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13206 0 0}If you are in need of anything, please do not hesitate to ask it of me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_TALK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13216 0 0}If you wish to fulfill a request, please speak with me for more detailed information.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Once you have completed a designated request, I ask that you report back to me at your earliest convenience.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Please be mindful that some requests may have deadlines, and must be completed within a set time limit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ELIZ_TARTARUS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}There has been a recent change in Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}It seems that a path that had been blocked off is now open.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_HERO_TARTARUS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Elizabeth said that a previously[n]blocked path is now open.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should check it out next[n]time I go to Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
